title: Main-Agent-only Activity lifecycle
prompt: Use only the verified main Agent capability to search and upsert a good user-readable Activity from Work artifact information. Reject a worker or caller-supplied role. Keep the title within 30 visible characters, attachments within ten, and link the stable governed target whenever one exists.
commands: personal-agent activity upsert --capability <ephemeral-main-turn-capability> --type work --title "完成本地构建" --detail "安装包已经准备好，可以开始本地验收。" --target-type work --target-id <task-id> --idempotency-key "local-build-v1" --correlation-key "local-build" --json
